positive: A whimsical, stylized composition featuring a cluster of floating celestial elements: stylized crescent moons, nebulous gas clouds, and constellations formed by glowing, interconnected geometric lines. The overall aesthetic is modern minimalist celestial pop art. The color palette should utilize deep indigo, celestial teal, soft lavender, and pops of metallic gold. The composition must be perfectly centralized, suitable for screen printing on dark fabrics. The lines should be clean, crisp, and high-contrast against a solid, implied background. Include stylized botanical elements, like highly symmetrical, stylized lunar flowers, integrated seamlessly with the celestial bodies. Vector-art quality, flat graphic design style, inspired by Art Nouveau meets modern tattoo flash. High detail, symmetrical, excellent silhouette.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, realistic, photography, 3d render, messy, cluttered
